events.name: Newport News Greek Festival
events.location: Saints Constantine and Helen Greek Orthodox Church
events.description: Experience authentic Greek food, music, dancing, and culture at this beloved annual community festival. The festival features a wide variety of traditional dishes, from moussaka to souvlaki, and a plethora of honey-drenched desserts. Join us for a weekend of celebration and community spirit in the heart of Newport News.

events.name: Summer Concert Series at Port Warwick
events.description: Enjoy free live music outdoors! Bring your chairs and blankets for a wonderful evening under the stars. The Summer Concert Series features a diverse lineup of talented artists playing everything from jazz and blues to pop and rock. It's the perfect midweek escape for families and friends.

events.name: Fall Festival at Newport News Park
events.description: One of the largest festivals in the area, featuring traditional crafts, food, and family entertainment. With over 200 vendors, the Fall Festival offers something for everyone, including heritage craft demonstrations, live folk music, and children's activities. Don't miss the beautiful autumn scenery of Newport News Park.

events.name: Newport News Spring Arts & Crafts Festival
events.description: Welcome spring with our annual Spring Arts & Crafts Festival at Huntington Park! Enjoy stunning local artwork, live acoustic performances, delicious food trucks, and interactive craft workshops for kids. It's the perfect way to spend a sunny weekend outdoors supporting local artists.

benefits.name: Homeownership Assistance Program
benefits.description: First-time buyers in Newport News may be eligible for up to $5,000 in down payment and closing cost assistance. This program aims to make homeownership more accessible for local residents by providing financial support for those who qualify based on income and residency requirements.

benefits.name: Virginia Senior Tax Relief Program
benefits.description: Property tax exemptions are available for seniors (65+) and individuals with disabilities meeting certain criteria. This state-mandated program provides significant savings for eligible homeowners in Newport News, helping them remain in their homes comfortably.

benefits.name: Cape Henry Memorial
benefits.description: Commemorates the site where English colonists first landed in 1607 and a key location during the Revolutionary War naval battle.

benefits.name: Cape Henry Memorial
benefits.target: General Public (Military ID required for access)
benefits.description: The Cape Henry Memorial marks the approximate site of the first landing of Jamestown settlers in Virginia in 1607 and commemorates the naval battle crucial to the American victory at Yorktown.

benefits.name: Cape Henry Memorial
benefits.description: This site marks the first landing spot of English colonists in April 1607 and commemorates the pivotal naval battle of the Revolutionary War.

benefits.name: Free Community Wi-Fi Expansion
benefits.description: Newport News has successfully expanded its free community Wi-Fi spots across the downtown area and major city parks. This initiative provides high-speed internet access to help students, remote workers, and families stay connected. Look for the 'NN-Free-Wifi' network in participating public spaces.
